title: Parse Deep Benchmark cell schema — v1.1
description: Backward-compatible extension of CONSOLIDATED-150 cell schema; adds parse-deep-v1 dimension fields. v0 = registered-not-yet-run; v1 = cells filled.

model_id.description: Adapter slug, e.g. chandra, qwen36-a3b, tesseract

nrun_status.description: v0 default: registered-not-yet-run. green only after repro_check.py passes.

ablation_id.description: Names the ensemble ablation (E1..E9) this cell belongs to, when applicable. NULL for non-ensemble cells.

pre_registration_id.description: Path or URL to the pre-registration document (the framework spec).

n.description: Per-doc score-vector length. LITERAL; never inferred. null if aggregate-only.

score.description: Primary metric value for this dimension.

score_vector_path.description: Path to per-doc score vector JSON; null if aggregate-only.

provenance.description: Free-text + URL/path to source-of-truth artifact. Per SAVIOR Appendix D 4-part contract.

pin_family.description: Decoding pin family per methodology §2. Cross-family (TR-000, extract) cells must set apples_to_oranges=true.

apples_to_oranges.description: True only if cell uses a pin family different from the dimension's home family per comparative-study I-1.

rerun_command.description: Single shell line that reproduces this cell from repo root with the pinned env.

factory_reproduced.description: FALSE at adapter emit time (TR-4). TRUE only after harness/repro_check.py exits 0.

env_hash.description: sha256(pyproject.toml + uv.lock + harness/_pin_manifest.json) at cell-write time.

contamination_audit.description: Mandatory when model_id carries [FT]; nullable for zero-shot rows.

ft_flag.description: Y/N from the Model name [FT] marker. Machine-greppable per I-4.

baseline_anchor.description: Name of the pre-registered baseline this cell is reported against.

iaa.description: Required only for net-new gold corpora per D-48; null when inherited.

compute.description: Populated at cell-run time; null in v0 registered-not-yet-run state.
